default.description: Legacy hybrid retriever: SQLite FTS5 + optional local Qdrant, linear fusion, parent-chunk replacement, kiwipiepy tokenisation. Every call that does not pass a 'pipeline' argument uses this.

keyword_only.description: Pure SQLite FTS5 keyword retrieval with RRF fusion. Skips the embedding API entirely; useful when the embedding endpoint is down or for benchmarking keyword recall against the default hybrid pipeline.

email.description: Email ingestion pipeline. Extracts messages from a .pst file (via Python 3.9 worker) and converts body + attachments to Markdown. Headers (subject, sender, recipients, received, folder_path) are folded into Document metadata so search can filter via metadata_condition. Retrieval uses the default hybrid pipeline.
